ItacPersonItem.Notes: Gualdo Priorato joined the Incogniti in 1647. Apparently he presented the first part of this work in the Academy in 1656, but he was criticised by Giovanfrancesco Loredan. Perhaps this is the reason why the book was issued without any relation to the Academy. See Gualdo`s biography on DBI, by Giuseppe Gullino, and Laura Gaetani`s entry in Le muse tra i libri. Il libro illustrato veneto... (Padua: 2009)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
